title: Ender's Pirate Armory - Blood Netherite Addon
description: Addon to Ender's Pirate Armory that changes netherite armor and weapons to be red instead of a purplish color
body: addon to Ender's Pirate Armory that changes netherite to be red, instead of a purple-ish color. This changes the textures of netherite swords, axes, and armor. There really isnt much to it.
